heading: Membership
label: 21004 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21004(a)36 App.:5905., , §§ 5, 8(g) (related to membership), .Aug. 13, 1998Pub. L. 105–231112 Stat. 153121004(b)36 App.:5908(g) (related to membership).In subsection (a), the words “Except as provided in this chapter” are substituted for “Except as provided in ” for consistency in the revised title.section 5908(g) of this titleIn subsection (b), the words “The terms of membership” are substituted for “In establishing the conditions of membership in the corporation” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the bylaws and articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: b .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The terms of membership may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, age, or national origin.
